name: StatInspector
description: Live attribute readout (mini-HUD) with a grouped settings picker for the stats you want on screen.
author: Stellar

fixed: Mini-HUD now remembers its position and shown/hidden state across relaunch. It was reading a dead private config key for its start-visibility, so it always started hidden — which (never mounting) also stopped its saved position from restoring and reset it to the default spot.
